steps.title: For detailed protocol steps, please see below
steps.instruction: For detailed protocol steps, please see below. The trash will be used as a waste reservoir for supernatant removal. This protocol is for full plates (96 samples) exclusively. Well 12 of the reservoir will be used for pooled samples.

steps.title: In each well of 96-well plate,...
steps.instruction: In each well of 96-well plate, add 1 μl of 0.4 μM of SBO. SBOs are unique to each well.

steps.title: Pipette the cells up and down...
steps.instruction: Pipette the cells up and down 10x with the pipette set to 50 μl in volume.

steps.title: Wash the cells by adding 150...
steps.instruction: Wash the cells by adding 150 μl of wash-resuspension buffer in each well.

steps.title: Aspirate and discard 150 μl of supernatant
steps.instruction: Aspirate and discard 150 μl of supernatant.

steps.title: Repeat steps 3-5 for additional two washes
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 3-5 for additional two washes.

steps.title: Pool all wells into one reagent reservoir column by column
steps.instruction: Pool all wells into one reagent reservoir column by column. Wash the first 8-well column with 150μl of Smart-seq3 lysis buffer per well (Smart-seq3 lysis buffer 1. (12.5% PEG 8000, 0.1% Triton, 0.5U/μl RNase inhibitor, 1.25 mM dNTP). Pipette up and down. Dispense 50 μl of cell suspension to the reagent reservoir. Transfer the remaining volume (~150 μl) from the previous well to the well in the next column.

steps.title: For the last column, transfer the...
steps.instruction: For the last column, transfer the entire volume to the reagent reservoir.

steps.title: Repeat steps 7-8 for an additional two times
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 7-8 for an additional two times.

steps.title: Transfer the cell suspension mixture from...
steps.instruction: Transfer the cell suspension mixture from the reagent reservoir to a 5 ml LoBind tube.

steps.title: Count cells
steps.instruction: Count cells. Adjust cell concentration to 1,000 cells/μl with Smart-seq3 lysis buffer.

steps.title: To each well of a skirted twin
steps.instruction: To each well of a skirted twin.tec 96-well LoBind plate, add 2 μl of cell suspension. Distribute cells into 95 wells. Add 2 μl of Smart-seq3 lysis buffer into one additional well as one negative control.
